languages.text: "Войска кого?" {n}Яруб сконфуженно порывается почесать в затылке, но вовремя спохватывается.{/n} "Не могу знать, Ваше Благородие. Мое отделение о приходе подкреплений не докладывало. Справляемся теми силами, что есть".

"House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, my {mf|lord|lady}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."
languages.original_text: "Войска кого?" {n}Яруб сконфуженно порывается почесать в затылке, но вовремя спохватывается.{/n} "Не могу знать, Ваше Благородие. Мое отделение о приходе подкреплений не докладывало. Справляемся теми силами, что есть".

traits.locale_text: "House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."

"House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."

"House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."

languages.text: «¿De cuál casa?». {n}Jarub tiene el impulso de rascarse la nuca, pero lo reprime a medio camino.{/n} «Yo no sé de esas cosas, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Mi unidad no ha recibido aviso de que lleguen refuerzos. Nos estamos apañando con los que somos».
languages.original_text: "House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, my {mf|lord|lady}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."

traits.locale_text: «¿De cuál casa?». {n}Jarub tiene el impulso de rascarse la nuca, pero lo reprime a medio camino.{/n} «Yo no sé de esas cosas, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Mi unidad no ha recibido aviso de que lleguen refuerzos. Nos estamos apañando con los que somos».

languages.text: “什么家族？”{n}雅鲁布羞怯地挠挠后脑勺，随即收住动作。{/n}“我不知道，大人。我们部队没接到有援军抵达的消息。我们现有的人手还撑得住。”
languages.original_text: "House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, my {mf|lord|lady}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."

traits.locale_text: “什么家族？”{n}雅鲁布羞怯地挠挠后脑勺，随即收住动作。{/n}“我不知道，大人。我们部队没接到有援军抵达的消息。我们现有的人手还撑得住。”

languages.text: « La maison quoi ? » {n}Jarub fait mine de se gratter la tête d'un air gêné avant de se ressaisir in extremis.{/n} « J'en ai pas la moindre idée, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Personne dans mon unité a signalé l'arrivée de tels renforts. On se débrouille avec les troupes à notre disposition. »
languages.original_text: "House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, my {mf|lord|lady}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."

traits.locale_text: « La maison quoi ? » {n}Jarub fait mine de se gratter la tête d'un air gêné avant de se ressaisir in extremis.{/n} « J'en ai pas la moindre idée, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Personne dans mon unité a signalé l'arrivée de tels renforts. On se débrouille avec les troupes à notre disposition. »

languages.text: "Hangi hane?" {n}Jarub, çekingen bir şekilde ensesini kaşımak üzere hareketleniyor ama kendini tutuyor.{/n} "Bilemiyorum {mf|lordum|leydim}. Birliğim, herhangi bir takviye bildirmedi. Elimizdeki birliklerle idare ediyoruz."
languages.original_text: "House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, my {mf|lord|lady}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."

traits.locale_text: "Hangi hane?" {n}Jarub, çekingen bir şekilde ensesini kaşımak üzere hareketleniyor ama kendini tutuyor.{/n} "Bilemiyorum {mf|lordum|leydim}. Birliğim, herhangi bir takviye bildirmedi. Elimizdeki birliklerle idare ediyoruz."

languages.text: "Haus wer?" {n}Jarub will sich verlegen am Kopf kratzen, verkneift es sich dann aber.{/n} "Das weiß ich nicht, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Meiner Einheit wurde keine Verstärkung angekündigt. Wir kommen mit den Leuten aus, die wir haben."
languages.original_text: "House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, my {mf|lord|lady}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."

traits.locale_text: "Haus wer?" {n}Jarub will sich verlegen am Kopf kratzen, verkneift es sich dann aber.{/n} "Das weiß ich nicht, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Meiner Einheit wurde keine Verstärkung angekündigt. Wir kommen mit den Leuten aus, die wir haben."

languages.text: 「家？誰？」{n}ジャラブは恥ずかしそうに頭を掻こうとするが、止めた。{/n}「わかりません、殿。私の部隊は増援の到着を報告していません。手持ちの兵で頑張っています。」
languages.original_text: "House who?" {n}Jarub moves to sheepishly scratch the back of his head, but catches himself.{/n} "I wouldn't know, my {mf|lord|lady}. My unit's not reported any reinforcements arriving. We're making do with the troops we have."

traits.locale_text: 「家？誰？」{n}ジャラブは恥ずかしそうに頭を掻こうとするが、止めた。{/n}「わかりません、殿。私の部隊は増援の到着を報告していません。手持ちの兵で頑張っています。」
